mnemonics.title: CIA Triad
mnemonics.content: CIA - Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability (the three pillars of information security)

mnemonics.title: PUE Calculation
mnemonics.content: Total Power Over IT Power - TP/OITP for Power Usage Effectiveness calculation

mnemonics.title: Encryption Types
mnemonics.content: SAME KEY - Symmetric uses same key, ASYMMETRIC uses different keys
